sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَتِ الأُسْرَةُ الكَبِيرَةُ فِي بَيْتِ الجَدِّ.
sentences.translation: Velika porodica se skupila u djedinoj kući.
sentences.translationEn: The large family gathered at the grandfather's house.

sentences.translation: Došli su amidže, daidže i djeca.
sentences.translationEn: The uncles, maternal uncles, and children came.

sentences.translation: Sjeli su u baštu i jeli zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: They sat in the garden and ate together.

sentences.translation: Bio je to nezaboravan sretan dan.
sentences.translationEn: It was a happy and unforgettable day.
